comparison_surface_note: Compares official Play clientbound rotate_head framed packet id and entity-id/head-rotation body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

official_source.function_or_member: ClientboundRotateHeadPacket.STREAM_CODEC, private ClientboundRotateHeadPacket(FriendlyByteBuf), private write(FriendlyByteBuf), FriendlyByteBuf.readVarInt/writeVarInt, FriendlyByteBuf.readByte/writeByte, ClientboundRotateHeadPacket.getYHeadRot(), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.decorator(RegistryAccess.EMPTY)).codec().encode/decode(ClientboundRotateHeadPacket)

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Play, Direction::Clientbound, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Play clientbound rotate_head framed dispatch/decode; not entity existence, Level state, render readiness, or client-load completion.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Play clientbound rotate_head packet framing and dispatch/decode for one primitive entity id/head-rotation fixture only; it does not prove entity existence, Level state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
